title: Onboarding - Login
scenario: First-time app launch onboarding flow completes successfully from license agreement through login to Home Screen
steps: Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time
Accept the License Agreement when prompted
Observe the Login dialog displayed with Cancel and Continue buttons
Verify redirection to the Login/Sign-Up page showing options: Microsoft, Apple, Google, and Username/Password
Select a login method (e.g., Microsoft, Apple, Google, or enter Username/Password credentials)
Verify the app navigates to the Home Screen
expected: After successful login, the app navigates to the Home Screen.
